playlist_description: The ultimate progression playlist for high-intensity interval training, cardio, and heavy lifting. Professionally curated to take you from a steady warm-up to absolute peak performance and a smooth cooldown.
playlist_strategy: Progressive BPM and energy build, peaking at track 5-7, sustaining high energy, and ending with a dedicated cooldown phase.
